label: Mixture-of-Depths

node.label: Mixture-of-Depths
node.definition: Mixture-of-Depths routes only a budgeted subset of tokens through selected transformer layers, dynamically allocating depth while keeping aggregate compute predictable.
node.why_it_matters: It introduces conditional computation along network depth rather than only across experts or sequence positions.
limitations: Skipped tokens can lose critical updates, routing is difficult to optimize, and realized speedups depend on kernels.

dependencies.rationale: Mixture-of-Depths extends or specializes the architecture family Transformers.
Mixture-of-Depths is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Adaptive depth, early exit & token skipping.
Mixture-of-Depths is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Routing, conditional computation & mixture-of-experts.
Mixture-of-Depths is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Gating & multiplicative control.

sentence_units.text: Mixture-of-Depths routes only a budgeted subset of tokens through selected transformer layers, dynamically allocating depth while keeping aggregate compute predictable.
It introduces conditional computation along network depth rather than only across experts or sequence positions.
Skipped tokens can lose critical updates, routing is difficult to optimize, and realized speedups depend on kernels.
